record.field:
# Uellow Mobile API - Production
This endpoint provides REST API services for the Uellow mobile application.
## Available Endpoints
### Authentication (`/mobile/v1/auth`) - `POST /mobile/v1/auth/register` - Register new user - `POST /mobile/v1/auth/login` - Login user - `POST /mobile/v1/auth/logout` - Logout current user - `POST /mobile/v1/auth/refresh` - Refresh access token - `GET /mobile/v1/auth/health` - Health check
### Products (`/mobile/v1/products`) - `GET /mobile/v1/products` - Get products list with filters - `GET /mobile/v1/products/{product_id}` - Get product details - `GET /mobile/v1/products/categories` - Get product categories - `POST /mobile/v1/products/wishlist/{product_id}` - Toggle wishlist - `GET /mobile/v1/products/wishlist` - Get user wishlist
### Home (`/mobile/v1/home`) - `GET /mobile/v1/home` - Get home page data (banners, sections) - `GET /mobile/v1/home/search-suggestions` - Get search suggestions
### Wallet (`/mobile/v1/wallet`) - `GET /mobile/v1/wallet` - Get wallet balance and transactions - `GET /mobile/v1/wallet/transactions` - Get wallet transactions with pagination - `POST /mobile/v1/wallet/add-funds` - Add funds to wallet - `POST /mobile/v1/wallet/redeem-points` - Redeem loyalty points
### Notifications (`/mobile/v1/notifications`) - `GET /mobile/v1/notifications` - Get user notifications - `POST /mobile/v1/notifications/mark-read/{notification_id}` - Mark notification as read - `POST /mobile/v1/notifications/mark-all-read` - Mark all notifications as read - `POST /mobile/v1/notifications/register-device` - Register device for push notifications - `POST /mobile/v1/notifications/unregister-device` - Unregister device
## Base URL Production: https://uellow.com/mobile
## Authentication Uses JWT token-based authentication. Include the token in the Authorization header: ``` Authorization: Bearer <your_token> ```
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: https://uellow.com/mobile/docs

# Uellow Mobile API - Development
Development endpoint for testing and debugging the mobile API.
## Features - Same endpoints as production - Extended error messages - Request logging enabled - CORS enabled for localhost
## Base URL Development: http://localhost:8069/mobile-dev
## Available Endpoints See production endpoint documentation for complete list of endpoints.
### Key Differences from Production - More verbose error messages - Debug mode enabled - CORS allowed from any origin - Session saving disabled for performance
## Authentication Uses JWT token-based authentication with extended expiration time (1 hour).
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: http://localhost:8069/mobile-dev/docs

# Uellow Mobile API - Testing
Testing endpoint for automated tests and QA.
## Base URL Testing: http://localhost:8069/mobile-test
## Features - Isolated test environment - Mock data enabled - Fast token expiration for testing - Database transactions rolled back after tests
## Authentication Uses JWT token-based authentication.
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: http://localhost:8069/mobile-test/docs

# Uellow Mobile API - Staging
Staging endpoint for pre-production testing with production-like data.
## Base URL Staging: https://staging.uellow.com/mobile
## Features - Production-like environment - Real data (anonymized) - Performance testing enabled - Same configuration as production
## Authentication Uses JWT token-based authentication.
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: https://staging.uellow.com/mobile/docs

# Uellow Mobile API - Version 2 (Beta)
Next generation mobile API with enhanced features.
## Base URL Production: https://uellow.com/mobile/v2
## New Features - GraphQL support - WebSocket for real-time updates - Enhanced caching - Improved performance - New filtering options
## Authentication Uses JWT token-based authentication (same as v1).
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: https://uellow.com/mobile/v2/docs
## Note This is a beta version. Use v1 for production applications.

# Uellow Mobile API - Public Endpoints
Public endpoints that don't require authentication.
## Base URL Production: https://uellow.com/api/public
## Available Endpoints
### Public Access - `GET /api/public/products` - Browse products (no auth) - `GET /api/public/products/{id}` - Get product details - `GET /api/public/categories` - Get categories - `GET /api/public/health` - Health check
## Features - No authentication required - Rate limiting enabled - Cached responses - Read-only access
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: https://uellow.com/api/public/docs

# Uellow Mobile API - Admin
Administrative endpoints for managing mobile app data.
## Base URL Production: https://uellow.com/mobile/admin
## Available Endpoints
### User Management - `GET /mobile/admin/users` - List all mobile users - `GET /mobile/admin/users/{id}` - Get user details - `POST /mobile/admin/users/{id}/disable` - Disable user - `POST /mobile/admin/users/{id}/enable` - Enable user
### Analytics - `GET /mobile/admin/analytics/users` - User analytics - `GET /mobile/admin/analytics/products` - Product analytics - `GET /mobile/admin/analytics/orders` - Order analytics
### Notifications - `POST /mobile/admin/notifications/send` - Send push notification - `POST /mobile/admin/notifications/broadcast` - Broadcast to all users
## Authentication Requires admin authentication with special API key.
## Documentation Interactive API documentation: https://uellow.com/mobile/admin/docs
